# Compatibility shim — the single source of truth is pyproject.toml.
#
# Lock files (generated by uv, committed):
#   Runtime only:         requirements.lock
#   Runtime + dev + wf:   requirements-dev.lock
#
# Quick install (dev):
#   pip install -r requirements-dev.lock && pip install --no-deps -e .
#
# Regenerate after editing pyproject.toml:
#   uv pip compile pyproject.toml -o requirements.lock --python-version 3.13 --no-emit-package trafficmind
#   uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev --extra workflow -o requirements-dev.lock --python-version 3.13 --no-emit-package trafficmind

-r requirements.lock
